recipe.title: Sunday: Spinach & Ricotta Stuffed Shells with Broccoli
ingredients: 2 cups cooked spinach, squeezed very dry
2 cups marinara sauce (plus more if you like it saucier)
Olive oil, salt, pepper for broccoli
steps: Bring large pot of salted water to boil. Cook shells until al dente (about 9 minutes). Drain and rinse with cold water to stop cooking. Drizzle with a little olive oil to prevent sticking.
In a bowl, mix ricotta, spinach, Parmesan, and egg. Season with salt and pepper.
Spread 1 cup marinara in the bottom of a 9x13 baking dish.
Spoon about 1 tablespoon of filling into each shell and arrange seam-up in the dish.
Top with remaining marinara. Cover with foil and bake 20 minutes.
Meanwhile, toss broccoli florets with olive oil, salt, and pepper. Roast on a sheet pan at 425°F for 15–18 minutes until crisp-tender and lightly charred.
Serve shells with roasted broccoli on the side.
